short_signal_definition: extension % from 1h EMA (parabolic) or confluence pullback + reversal bar.
known_strengths: "Swing / trend-follower who moved from breakouts (got shaken out) to pullbacks, trades both long and short, learned pullbacks from the short side first."
known_weaknesses: "Parabolic reversals are counter-trend (timing/knife-catch risk). - A single +969% year is likely regime-specific -- test across regimes; expect lower."
